description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, featuring a mix of brick and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch, large windows, and a driveway leading to a detached garage. The backyard is enclosed by a fence and contains a swimming pool, patio area, and several palm trees, creating a private outdoor space. The roof appears to have a green area or rooftop garden, adding a touch of nature to the urban setting. The house is surrounded by paved walkways and driveways, with ample space for vehicles and outdoor activities. The overall design blends contemporary elements with functional outdoor amenities.
description: A modern two-story brick and white house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, and a fenced backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, detached garage, and rooftop garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, pool area, and the fence enclosing the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pool, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the side of the house with bay windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entryway with a porch, wide steps, and a modern door flanked by large windows
